# Code Anchors: Committed Queue

- `.nexus/queue/` — the committed queue surface: one folder per epic (or one decision-only memo) holding gated human artifacts, now also carrying per-user engineer scratch.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.epic.md` — creates the queue entry and seeds it with the epic artifact.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.close.md` — writes the human-prose close record into the epic's committed queue entry; in the --pr post-merge flow it commits that close record on the distillation branch, there being no feature pull request left to carry it.
- `CLAUDE.md` — the authoring rule that places per-user decision scratch inside the epic's queue entry.
